data.title: Donald Trump: Israel did not push US into war with Iran | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: “Israel never talked me into the war with Iran, the results of Oct. 7th, added to my lifelong opinion that IRAN CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON, did.” the post read.
data.keywords: Israel,Iran,United States,Donald Trump,ceasefire,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
